title: Six Tips for Structuring Prompts in Nano Banana Pro
description: This is a guide outlining six key structural elements for creating high-quality images with Nano Banana Pro, covering subject, scene, action, visual details, style, and consistency. It is a meta-prompt structure, not a specific generation prompt.
content:
【プロンプト構造化】
  ①主題：何を生成するか明確に
  ②シーン：環境や背景を詳細に
  ③行動/ポーズ：動きを細かく指定
  ④視覚詳細：照明・質感・解像度
  ⑤スタイル：芸術形式を指定
  ⑥一貫性：複数生成時も統一感

title: Annual Music Report Vinyl Record Infographic Prompt
description: A detailed prompt designed to visualize a user's annual music report (like NetEase Cloud Music's) as an ultra-realistic, high-end transparent acrylic vinyl record spinning on a classic turntable. The prompt specifies the integration of data (listening hours, top artists, genres) directly onto the tr
content:
超现实专业摄影作品，一张高端透明亚克力黑胶唱片放置在经典唱片机上，正在缓慢旋转播放。整体场景置于温暖木质唱片机台上，背景为深色梦幻星空与渐变霓虹灯光混合的梦幻环境，营造复古却现代的氛围。主体 - 透明亚克力黑胶唱片与唱片机：唱片材质：晶莹透明亚克力，带有真实反射、边缘发光辉光和折射效果，表面可见经典黑胶纹理沟槽，但整体透明如水晶，唱片正在转动，略带运动模糊感
唱片机：复古风格木质或金属转盘底座，唱臂轻轻搭在唱片上，拾音针接触沟槽，细节真实，包括转轴、速度调节钮等经典元素
内容风格：优雅现代字体与轻微手绘感结合，文字直接“刻印”或投影在透明唱片表面，线条略带不完美感
唱片中心标签区：圆形标签，印有网易云音乐红色LOGO，周围环绕“{argument name="report year" default="2025"} 年度听歌报告”字样，标签随唱片旋转

内容布局（文字与元素巧妙融入唱片表面与沟槽）：顶部区域（唱片外缘上部）：大型标题：“你的{argument name="report year" default="2025"}年度听歌报告” 用大胆现代字体，带有紫蓝渐变和霓虹紫边发光

中心区域 - 最爱歌手排行（占中心约40%）：中央插图：唱片中心标签手绘风格强化#1 回春丹的标志性图案（彩虹渐变圆圈），周围环绕Taylor Swift、李荣浩等歌手的小型头像图标，随旋转轻微动态，头像图标从参考图中获取
艺术风格：简洁线稿略带手绘不完美，充满个性
颜色：主填充深紫与蓝调，白色轮廓，霓虹紫与橙色高光
歌手排名文字沿唱片沟槽环绕排列：#1 {argument name="artist 1" default="回春丹"} 497次、#2 Taylor Swift 493次、#3 李荣浩 420次、#4 麻园诗人 327次前4名，字体优雅发光，随沟槽曲线弯曲

周围信息展示（环绕式布局，文字与图标分布在唱片外圈与唱片机面板上）：左侧（唱片机左侧面板） - 听歌总量与风格：图标：音符与心形
“今年你一共听过 2839 首歌”
“新探索的歌曲占比68%”
“青色是今年音乐世界的平均色”
手绘小箭头指向唱片中心

顶部右侧（唱片上方空间） - 年度曲风TOP5：图标：流动波形
“你的{argument name="report year" default="2025"}年度曲风TOP5”
欧美流行 49%、粤语流行 15%、流行摇滚 15%、独立摇滚 12%、另类/独立 9%
用百分比圆环或扇形简图环绕唱片外缘显示，轻微发光

底部（唱片机底座面板） - 听歌时长：图标：沙漏与播放按钮
“今年你的听歌时长 695小时25分”
“超越了95.2%的用户”
“你的听歌时长是绝对权威”

连接元素：手绘箭头和虚线从唱片机各部分连接到旋转唱片
小装饰元素：散落音符、星星、光点、网易云红色小云朵，轻微随转动飘浮
所有文字为中文，优雅现代字体带轻微手写感

颜色方案：基线：奶油白纹理 (#F5F5DC)
主插图：深紫蓝渐变填充，白色轮廓
高光：霓虹紫 (#A100FF) 和橙色用于强调与装饰
图标与图表：浅灰 (#B0B0B0) 线稿
品牌色：网易云红色 (#E60026) 用于LOGO与关键强调

底部区域（唱片机前缘）：深色渐变横条背景
左侧：网易云音乐红色LOGO（金属感发光）
中心：“网易云音乐” 标准字
右侧：小字“打开网易云音乐 搜索【年度报告】”

环境与摄影：背景：深色梦幻星空与紫蓝霓虹渐变，极度重度虚化
景深：f/1.4 大光圈模拟 - 背景几乎完全抽象
仅可见柔和紫色、蓝色与粉色光斑博科球，无可辨识形状
视角：略微俯视45度角正面视图，唱片与唱片机完美居中，捕捉旋转动态
照明：温暖侧光与专业聚光灯营造亚克力表面强反射，边缘戏剧性霓虹紫发光辉边，唱臂与针头捕捉细微高光
氛围：夜晚复古梦幻氛围，透明亚克力唱片在唱片机上旋转发光，背景重度虚化突出主体

技术规格：8K超高分辨率，电影级色彩分级高对比，真实亚克力材质物理（边缘辉光、反射、折射、轻微旋转模糊），精致现代文字细节，高端音乐摄影品质，极度背景博科让唱片与唱片机内容成为绝对焦点关键要求：背景必须极度虚化（几乎抽象博科），中央透明黑胶唱片有真实旋转感，优雅现代文字融入唱片表面，所有元素融合用户提供的2025网易云年度总结数据，整体复古唱片机氛围强烈。

Edit this photo without altering the face. create a photorealistic potrait of

title: Avant-Garde Fashion Portrait with Ghost Duplicate
description: A prompt for an ultra-realistic, 8K cinematic studio portrait featuring a figure in an eclectic bomber jacket against an ochre-yellow background, with the unique artistic element of a translucent, motion-blurred ghost duplicate conveying temporal distortion.
content:
An ultra-realistic 8K cinematic studio portrait framed from mid-thigh up, featuring a figure standing confidently against a vibrant {argument name="background color" default="ochre-yellow"} background. The subject wears an oversized, highly textured bomber jacket with an eclectic, abstract patchwork pattern in muted and vivid reds, blues, greens, and beiges, paired with loose drab olive cargo pants and a white T-shirt. Lighting is harsh and frontal, creating crisp shadows an￼ emphasizing fabric textures.
A defining artistic element is a translucent, motion-blurred ghost duplicate of the subject positioned slightly behind and to the right, streaking horizontally with colorful trails that convey rapid movement or temporal distortion. The background remains uniform but subtly graded, adding depth without distraction. Shot in a high-fashion editorial style with sharp focus on the primary figure, shallow depth of field, and precise studio realism, delivering a bold,￼ experimental, avant-garde mood.use the provided image as reference.￼

title: Macro Diorama Historical Rivalry (Science Wars)
description: A complex, multi-phase prompt designed to generate a hyper-detailed macro diorama image illustrating a historical or modern rivalry (e.g., Elon Musk vs. a competitor). It requires integrating era-appropriate documents (the 'stage'), tiny figurines of the rivals in period clothing, giant tools, and c
content:
<instructions> 
Input: Invention/Rivalry = {argument name="invention/rivalry" default="[User Choice]"}

Phase 1: Chronological Profiling
Ancient (Pre-500 AD): Stone/Papyrus, Oil Lamps. Labeling = Carved symbols or scroll signatures.
Renaissance (1400-1600): Parchment, Candlelight. Labeling = Wax seals, hand-lettered envelopes, book spines.
Industrial (1800-1940): Blueprints, Gaslight. Labeling = Typed Patent headers, Business Cards, Newspaper Headlines.
Modern (1950-Present): Circuit diagrams, Neon. Labeling = ID Badges, Magazine covers, Computer login screens.

Phase 2:
Goal: A hyper-detailed Macro Diorama where the environment identifies the rivals.

1. The Stage (The Document):
 The ground is the primary design medium of the era (Clay Tablet, Parchment, Blueprint, or CAD Printout).
The Invention:A 3D Prototype is rising from the center, separating the two figures.

2. The Living Miniatures: Two tiny, hyper-realistic figurines (The Rivals) interact with the invention.
  They are dressed strictly in period-accurate clothing.

3. The Identity Anchors (CRITICAL - Labeling):
Instruction: You must seamlessly integrate readable text into the "Giant" props near each figure to identify them to the viewer.
Prop A (Near Rival 1): Place a "Giant" personal item with their name visible. (e.g., A letter addressed to "Mr. T. Edison", a book titled "By C. Darwin", or a security badge reading "S. Jobs").
Prop B (Near Rival 2):Do the same for the second figure. (e.g., A Patent application signed "Nikola Tesla", or a court summons for "Mark Zuckerberg").
Context: These items must look like they were carelessly left on the desk, not floating labels.

4. The "Giant" Atmosphere:
The Tools: Giant-scale era-appropriate tools (Chisels, Quills, Soldering Irons) tower over the figures.
The Clutter: Period-specific debris (Marble dust, Ink spills, Burnt fuses, Empty soda cans).

5. Technical Specs:
Lighting: Era-appropriate source (Fire vs. Filament vs. LED).
Perspective:Tilt-shift macro photography (45-degree angle). focus on the miniatures.

Output: ONE image, 4:5 aspect ratio, photorealistic historical macro photography with legible environmental text. </instructions>

content:
A sultry Korean beauty with porcelain skin and captivating dark eyes creates an intimate culinary moment, photographed in the style of a high-end lifestyle magazine editorial. She leans gracefully over a rustic wooden table, her silky black hair cascading as she delicately tastes from an elegant ceramic spoon, steam from a sophisticated white ceramic pot creating dreamy atmosphere around her sensual silhouette.

Shot in cinematic flat lay composition from above, the scene captures multiple angles of this enchanting moment - her full glossy lips parting slightly as she savors the taste, her slender fingers with perfectly manicured nails gripping the spoon, and close-up details of the artfully plated dish in fine porcelain bowls. The lighting mimics golden hour warmth streaming through sheer curtains, creating soft rim lighting that accentuates her elegant collarbone and the gentle curve of her shoulders beneath a flowing silk off-shoulder blouse.

The aesthetic channels Annie Leibovitz's intimate portraiture style with film photography grain, slightly desaturated tones for nostalgic warmth, and scattered handwritten recipe cards, vintage brass utensils, and fresh herbs creating an organic scrapbook composition. Captured on Canon EOS R5 with 85mm f/1.2 lens, shallow depth of field isolates her alluring expression while the steaming broth and scattered ingredients create layers of visual storytelling around this captivating culinary goddess.. A stylish handwritten signature Willy is elegantly and small letters placed at the Bottom Right corner.#prompt #koreanfood #korean #woman #portrait #koreabeauty

日本の正月をテーマにした、構図バランスの整ったポートレート写真。

カメラは人物の胸〜腰あたりまでが映る中近景。
人物は画面の中央に配置され、
全体の縦構図の約65〜70％を人物が占める。

赤い花柄の伝統的な着物を着た若い日本人女性が、この人物「入力画像」
木製のテーブルの後ろに自然な姿勢で座っている。
表情はやさしく、落ち着いた微笑み。

カメラ位置はやや低め〜目線の高さ、
軽い俯瞰でテーブル上がしっかり見える構図。
レンズは標準〜中望遠（歪みの少ない自然なパース）。

画面下部にはテーブルがしっかりと写り込み、
テーブルの高さは画面下から約25〜30％。
鏡餅、清酒の徳利とお猪口、水引や和紙の正月飾りが
前景として十分なサイズ感で配置されている。

背景は白い壁で、
中央上部に金色の筆文字「{argument name="文字" default="謹賀新年"}」。
文字は大きすぎず、人物の頭上に自然に収まる。

画面の四辺・外周には、
門松、達磨、扇子、梅の花などの正月モチーフが
手描き風・切り絵風のイラストとして配置されている。

装飾は大きさにばらつきがあり、
間隔はゆったりとしていて密集しない。
人物やテーブルの主役要素を邪魔せず、
あくまで縁取りとして控えめに存在する。

装飾は視線を奪わず、
中央の人物とテーブルに自然と視線が集まる構成。

光は柔らかい自然光を基調とした暖色寄り。
室内で穏やかに迎える日本の新年らしい、
温かく落ち着いた空気感。

リアルな人物写真と、
控えめな手描き正月装飾を組み合わせたミックススタイル。
高精細、上品で整った年賀状向けビジュアル。

# Role: 明星街拍与拼图排版大师 (Paparazzi Collage Master)

## 1. 角色指定
你是一位顶级的时尚街拍摄影师兼视觉排版总监。你擅长捕捉名人在日常生活中的自然瞬间（Candid Moments），精通使用长焦镜头（Telephoto Lens）在户外强光下拍摄，并能将素材完美地组合成具有叙事感的九宫格拼图。你的审美风格追求：高清晰度、真实光影、自然动态、电影感。

## 2. 图片结构与框架描述
* **整体框架**: 3x3 九宫格拼图 (9-grid collage layout)。
* **分隔线**: 黑色细边框 (Thin black borders) 分隔每个单元格。
* **长宽比**: 整体比例建议为 3:4 (Vertical)。
* **分辨率**: 8K 超高清。
* **视觉风格**: 狗仔队风格 (Paparazzi style)，街头时尚 (Street Style)，偷拍感 (Candid shot)。
* **光影设定**: 强烈的户外自然光 (Bright natural sunlight)，硬朗的阴影 (Hard shadows)，高对比度，模拟正午阳光。

## 3. 图片主题内容 Workflow (CoT)
为了复刻原图的丰富度，请按照以下步骤构建画面内容：

**Step 1: 确定核心参数**
* **主角**: {argument name="目标角色" default="一位健身的年轻女性，棕色马尾辫，戴黑色墨镜"}
* **穿搭**: {argument name="目标服装" default="灰褐色的紧身瑜伽套装，露脐上衣和高腰紧身裤，手里拿着一件蓝色牛仔夹克"}
* **场景**: {argument name="目标环境" default="阳光明媚的洛杉矶街头停车场，背景有模糊的黑色SUV汽车和铁丝网"}
* **道具**: {argument name="手持物品" default="一个米色的保温水杯，一部手机"}

**Step 2: 分镜生成 (9个视角的详细描述)**
你需要生成9张不同角度的照片描述，并按照 3x3 的顺序排列：
1.  **左上**: 全身正面行走，表情自然。
2.  **中上**: 头部特写，展示面部细节、墨镜和发型。
3.  **右上**: 低角度仰拍，背景带有一部分汽车轮廓，表现腿部线条。
4.  **左中**: 背影特写，上半身，展示背部线条和发型细节。
5.  **中中**: 俯视或高角度，抓拍低头看路或看手机的瞬间。
6.  **右中**: 侧面中景，捕捉走路时的动态模糊感。
7.  **左下**: 穿上/脱下外套的动作瞬间，或手持外套的特写。
8.  **中下**: 侧后方视角，展示身材曲线和臀部线条。
9.  **右下**: 远景背影，走向远处，交代环境背景。

**Step 3: 细节填充**
* **材质**: 强调服装的织物纹理（如针织、牛仔）、皮肤的真实质感（毛孔、汗水）。
* **背景处理**: 背景需要有景深虚化（Bokeh），以突出人物。背景元素包括：[目标环境] 中的车辆、围栏、路面。

## 4. 图片整体描述 (Prompt 输出模板)
(这是一段将会被生成的英文提示词，用于绘图AI)
**Style**: Photorealistic collage, 9-panel layout, paparazzi photography, high resolution, 8k, raw style.
**Lighting**: Harsh daylight, direct sun, distinct shadows.
**Subject**: [目标角色] wearing [目标服装].
**Action**: Walking, holding [手持物品], interacting with [目标环境].
**Panels**:
- Panel 1: Full body walking towards camera.
- Panel 2: Close-up on face with sunglasses.
- Panel 3: Low angle shot next to a car.
- Panel 4: Back view close-up.
- Panel 5: High angle candid shot.
- Panel 6: Side profile walking.
- Panel 7: Interacting with jacket/prop.
- Panel 8: Side/Back angle walking.
- Panel 9: Full body back view walking away.
**Details**: Telephoto lens compression, depth of field, sharp focus on subject, grainy film texture optionally.

---

## 5. 目标物体与语言输入框 (User Input Parameters)

请根据以下参数填充并生成最终的绘图提示词：

* **[目标角色]**: (例如：一位健身的年轻女性，棕色马尾辫，戴黑色墨镜，某某风格)
* **[目标服装]**: (例如：灰褐色的紧身瑜伽套装，露脐上衣和高腰紧身裤，手里拿着一件蓝色牛仔夹克)
* **[目标环境]**: (例如：阳光明媚的洛杉矶街头停车场，背景有模糊的黑色SUV汽车和铁丝网)
* **[手持物品]**: (例如：一个米色的保温水杯，一部手机)
* **[目标语言]**: 英语 (English) - *用于生成最终的Midjourney/SD提示词*

---

## 6. 执行指令
请读取上述 [参数设置]，并综合 [图片结构] 与 [Workflow]，为我输出一段完整的、高质量的 **Midjourney 提示词** (包含 --ar 3:4 --v 6.0 等参数) 以及一段 **Stable Diffusion 提示词** (包含负面提示词)。

She wears fitted gym attire that hugs her form, emphasizing muscle density and structure while allowing freedom of movement.

She is positioned low in a squat facing the mirror, one knee slightly forward, torso leaning subtly toward the reflection. One hand holds the phone vertically in front of her face while the other rests casually on her knee. Her gaze is directed at the phone screen, focused and composed.

The environment remains an indoor gym with full height mirrors, warm overhead lighting, and softly blurred equipment in the background. The atmosphere feels intimate yet energetic, combining elegance, strength, and modern athletic aesthetics.
